notes: Uniform clean-cutout v2 trial assets for the first five common public FDM material categories. Existing live placeholder filenames and v1 review assets are intentionally untouched until visual approval.
negativePrompt: No text, no logos, no watermark, no labels, no floating object, no impossible geometry, no melted plastic, no waxy AI look, no oversaturated colors, no dramatic fantasy lighting, no cartoon, no 3D render aesthetics.

materials.alt: Uniform clean cutout product photo of a matte pastel PLA 3D printed desk organizer with subtle FDM layer lines
materials.prompt: Hyperrealistic clean cutout-style product photograph of a matte pastel PLA 3D printed small desk organizer, subtle authentic FDM layer lines visible on close inspection. Near-white warm-grey seamless background, single centered object, consistent three-quarter front camera angle, soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, very soft natural grounding shadow, no props or room context.

style.name: uniform clean cutout product photography
style.lighting: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left with a very soft grounding shadow
style.camera: low three-quarter front angle, centered product, consistent object scale
style.composition: horizontal 4:3 product photo, object fills about 62% of image width with generous margins
